headline: IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. Announces Amendments to and Further Extension of Consent Solicitations
summary: IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. ("IPALCO") today announced that it is amending and extending each of its previously announced solicitations of consents (each, a "Consent Solicitation" and, collectively, the "Consent Solicitations") from registered holders (the "Holders") of its 4.25% Senior Notes due 2030 and 5.75% Senior Notes due 2034 (collectively, the "Notes") to adopt certain proposed amendments (the "Proposed Amendments") to the indentures governing each series of Notes, as further described belo

headline: DPL LLC Announces Amendments to and Further Extension of Consent Solicitation
summary: DPL LLC (f/k/a DPL Inc.) ("DPL") today announced that it is amending and extending its previously announced solicitation of consents (the "Consent Solicitation") from registered holders (the "Holders") of its 4.35% Senior Notes due 2029 (the "Notes") to adopt certain proposed amendments (the "Proposed Amendments") to the indenture governing the Notes, as further described below.
